# RemainFrame

> RemainFrame is a custom AI secretary for small businesses and owner-led teams.

RemainFrame is built around the way a business already works. It can help prepare customer follow-ups, organize approved information, create recurring summaries, carry useful context forward, and keep open work from getting lost. For many repeat jobs, RemainFrame can turn instructions and corrections into a reusable skill. Specific outside tools and connections are reviewed and configured for each setup.

When a job needs a more involved integration, website, form, dashboard, customer portal, or custom piece of software, Dade.Studio can design, build, and test that supporting tool.

Important messages, spending, deletion, record changes, and business decisions should remain behind an appropriate human review or approval step. RemainFrame is not promised to connect to every outside service, and AI output can be wrong.
